title: Servitude of light.
doc_html:
Art. 703.  Servitude of light.

The servitude of light is the right by which the owner of the dominant estate is entitled to make openings in a common wall for the admission of light; this includes the right to prevent the neighbor from making an obstruction.

Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
